name: Toufu
description: Tōfu (トウフウ, Toufuu) is a self-proclaimed ex-bandit.    ~!Although claiming to be an ex-bandit, he was actually a spy working for a gang leader, as his double agent in the village. His major work involved gathering information. He was arrested by a Konohagakure joint team after the gang was defeated. !~  Debut: Naruto Shippūden Episode #195  (source: http://naruto.wikia.com/wiki/Tofu)
